title: arundo pumila
intro: Arundo pumila, also known as dwarf cane or small cane, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Arundo, native to the Indian subcontinent. The medicinal properties of Arundo pumila include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can aid in treating conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Arundo pumila is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal remedies, and its extracts are also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
